creator: Amal Kumar / Poly Haven
selection_reason: Homogeneous charcoal rock with broad fractures and no mortar pattern. Selected for individually modeled monolithic hero ruins after the masonry-band granite material created doubled seams on broken arch v1.
usage_rule: Use a 2.4m physical UV span. Geometry defines every block, joint, crown failure, and medium fracture; the scan supplies only rock-scale surface detail.
